title: Tabnine Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for engineers to effectively use Tabnine for code completion and assistance.

commands.description: Check the installed version of Tabnine.
commands.scenario: When verifying the current version of Tabnine installed on your system.
When you need to adjust Tabnine settings to optimize performance or preferences.
When you need to troubleshoot or temporarily stop Tabnine from running.

commands.description: Re-enable Tabnine after it has been disabled.
commands.scenario: When you want to resume using Tabnine after troubleshooting.
When you need to remove Tabnine completely from your environment.

commands.description: Set the logging level to debug for detailed logs.
commands.scenario: When diagnosing issues with Tabnine and needing detailed logs.

commands.description: Set the API key for Tabnine Pro features.
commands.scenario: When activating Tabnine Pro features that require an API key.

commands.description: Switch to the deep learning model for better accuracy.
commands.scenario: When you need more accurate code completions using deep learning models.

commands.description: Switch to the fast model for quicker completions.
commands.scenario: When speed is prioritized over accuracy for code completions.

commands.description: Enable context-aware completions for smarter suggestions.
commands.scenario: When you want Tabnine to consider the context of your code for suggestions.
When context-aware suggestions are causing issues or not needed.
When you want to report bugs or suggest improvements to Tabnine.
When setting up Tabnine for use with Visual Studio Code.

commands.description: Specifies a custom directory for storing and loading local model weights to optimize startup time in air-gapped environments.
Configures the connection to route Tabnine API requests through a corporate proxy server for secure network environments.
Limits the number of tokens sent to the model for context, useful for reducing latency in extremely large codebases.
Purges the local indexing and suggestion cache to resolve hallucination issues or stale context errors.
Triggers a manual check for the latest engine and model updates without performing a full reinstall.
